learning_outcomes: Talk about what you do in your free time
Distinguish between solo and social activities
Use present simple to describe regular hobbies

content.prompt_es: Relaciona la actividad con su traducción:
¿Cuál es una actividad que sueles hacer solo? ([[watch|ver]])
Completa con la forma correcta del verbo: ([[watch|ver]])
content.stimulus_en: She ________ (go) to the cinema on Fridays.

content.prompt_es: ¿Es gramaticalmente correcto? 'My brother meets his friends every weekend.' ([[watch|ver]])

content.transcript: Anna and her brother, Tom, like to relax on Sunday afternoons. They sit on the sofa and watch TV together. They enjoy watching cartoons and funny shows. Their favorite show is on at 4 o'clock. After TV, they sometimes eat popcorn. Sunday is their favorite day to spend time together.

content.prompt_es: ¿Qué hacen el domingo por la tarde según el texto? ([[sometimes|a veces]])
content.stimulus_en: Anna and her brother, Tom, like to relax on Sunday afternoons. They sit on the sofa and [[watch TV|ver la televisión]] together. They enjoy watching cartoons and funny shows. Their favorite show is on at 4 o'clock. After TV, they sometimes eat popcorn. Sunday is their favorite day to spend time together.

content.title: Pronunciación: Free Time Activities
content.instructions: Escucha y repite la frase enfocándote en la entonación.
